meta.description: Perform differential expression analysis between two or more groups using limma, DESeq2, or edgeR. Inputs: count or normalized expression matrix, group labels. Outputs: DEG result table, volcano plot, heatmap, session metadata.

scientific_integrity.detail: No fabricated DOI, PMID, trial result, sample size, p-value, or unsupported scientific claim was generated during audit.

practice_boundaries.detail: The skill performs computational data analysis and does not make diagnostic or treatment recommendations.

methodological_ground.detail: The workflow uses standard data-analysis methods and documents assumptions, thresholds, and output interpretation boundaries.

code_usability.detail: Native CLI execution was verified using /opt/homebrew/bin/Rscript in this environment.

functional_suitability.note: The skill provides a complete Data Analysis workflow with documented inputs, outputs, examples, and deterministic artifacts.

reliability.note: Native execution was verified with /opt/homebrew/bin/Rscript; remaining risks are limited to environment dependency drift.

performance_context.note: Runtime is appropriate for bundled smoke-test data and the workflow writes concise tabular and plot artifacts.

agent_usability.note: CLI usage, parameters, output paths, and troubleshooting guidance are sufficiently clear for agent invocation.

human_usability.note: Examples and reference documentation make the workflow discoverable and reproducible for human reviewers.

security.note: No credential handling or unsafe dynamic code execution was identified; file-path based inputs are used.

maintainability.note: Implementation is modular across scripts, references, and tests, making future updates straightforward.

agent_specific.note: The skill has clear trigger boundaries, structured CLI execution, and reproducible output conventions.

key_strengths: Native R execution succeeded with the Homebrew Rscript path and bundled test data.
The workflow covers multiple common differential-expression methods with clear CLI parameters.
Output artifacts include result tables, filtered significant genes, visualizations, and session metadata.
Scope boundaries are appropriate for bulk expression differential analysis.

recommendations.title: Document preferred Rscript path
recommendations.problem: Using the wrong Rscript path can falsely report missing packages in this macOS/Homebrew setup.
recommendations.root_cause: The environment has more than one Rscript installation with different package libraries.
recommendations.fix: Mention /opt/homebrew/bin/Rscript in local execution notes or environment troubleshooting for this bundle.
